metadata.description: Abhijit's AI-agent skills: iOS dev loop, Linear PM, core workflow helpers

plugins.name: ios-dev
plugins.description: iOS development loop: simulator build + preview + screenshot delivery, device builds, TestFlight/App Store release automation

plugins.name: linear-pm
plugins.description: Linear project management conventions and slash commands: issue templates, agent-ready workflow, autonomous issue pickup

plugins.name: core-workflow
plugins.description: General dev workflow helpers: commit flow, skill contribution, team orchestration, image-parser and web-researcher agents, shellcheck-on-edit hook

plugins.name: second-wind
plugins.description: Set-and-forget orchestrator for long Claude Code runs: when the 5-hour usage limit pauses sessions, wind notices, waits for the reset, and resumes every tmux session — including overnight
